observations: DatabaseConnections climbed to 490 while max_connections on the instance is 500.
CPUUtilization stayed moderate, which indicates the immediate issue is session exhaustion rather than CPU starvation.

metrics.summary: DatabaseConnections remained between 486 and 494 for 20 minutes, leaving almost no free sessions.
CPUUtilization stayed below 52%, so the database still had compute headroom while client sessions were exhausted.
